hero.tagline: Turning Complex Problems into Elegant Solutions
hero.intro: I turn complex requirements into elegant, clean, and highly optimized digital experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: My Story & Professional Philosophy
about.philosophy_text: To me, development is not just about writing lines of code; it is about crafting digital craftsmanship. I believe in performance-first design, code reusability, and continuous self-improvement. Whether optimizing a SQL query or building an immersive user interface, attention to detail is non-negotiable.

contact.title: Let's Connect

contact.description: Have a challenging project, open position, or just want to chat? Reach out through any of these platforms. I typically respond within 24 hours.
